# Testing the API

You can test the API directly with cURL, or use the [Postman collection](https://www.postman.com/workos/workspace/workos-public/collection/25188762-79ce1172-4741-4f1d-a486-64380f9a599f?ctx=documentation) for convenience.

> Check out the [guide](https://workos.com/docs/postman) about the WorkOS API Postman collection to learn more about it.
